name: Runalone Project Manager

releases.author: nestedshell
releases.description:
Maintenance release addressing Obsidian community review feedback:
- Replaced direct `element.style` mutations (display, cursor, userSelect) with CSS classes
- Replaced `document.createElement`/`createElementNS` with Obsidian's `createEl`/`createDiv`/`createSpan`/`createSvg` helpers
- Use `new Setting().setHeading()` instead of raw HTML heading elements
- Removed `document.write` usage in export/print
- `onunload` no longer detaches leaves (preserves user leaf position)
- Set `minAppVersion` to 1.7.2 (required by `Workspace.revealLeaf`)
- Cleaned up command IDs/names and unused variables
- Added `versions.json`

releases.author: nestedshell
releases.description:
# Runalone Project Manager
**Built for solo builders with busy brains.**

This is the very first public release of Runalone Project Management.

## What’s inside
- Initial implementation of the core project management system
- Kanban-style task organization
- Gantt-based timeline visualization

## Installation
1.	Download the release archive
2.	Unzip it
3.	Copy the folder into your Obsidian Community Plugins vault directory
4.	Enable the plugin from Obsidian settings

## Notes
This release focuses on laying a solid foundation.
The feature set is intentionally minimal and designed for solo builders who value clarity over complexity.

More features, refinements, and improvements are coming.

nestedshell
releases.name: First Release
